channel.title: Smartypants
channel.description: Latest releases from Smartypants on Dropout.tv

item.title: Bullying, Bedbugs, Kissing
item.description:
Kristen justifies bullying kids. Phil demystifies bedbugs. Ify advocates for kissing the homies.

Duration: 37:03

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories, ify nwadiwe, phil jamesson, kristen bartlett

item.title: Crows, Anime, Parties
item.description:
Vinny teaches crow history. Ryan swipes right on otakus. Katie reveals how to be the best guest.

Duration: 37:09

Tags: Smartypants, rekha shankar, education, powerpoint, weird, dumb questions, no chill, experts, theories, vinny thomas, ryan barton, katie marovitch
